creator: chris.armer@gigenet.com
text:
We fully support FreeBSD on all our products as of now.  We have integrated FreeBSD 9 in to our Cloud Server product as well and will be releasing it in a few days.   I would love to continue to support FreeBSD can we be added to the vendor list?

http://www.gigenet.com
http://www.gigenetcloud.com
